examples.title: ER to Relational Mapping
examples.explanation: Strong entities become tables with primary keys. Relationships become foreign keys

examples.title: Weak Entity Implementation
examples.code:
CREATE TABLE Dependent (
  EmpID INT,
  DepName VARCHAR(50),
  Relation VARCHAR(20),
  PRIMARY KEY (EmpID, DepName),
  FOREIGN KEY (EmpID) REFERENCES Employee(EmpID)
);
examples.explanation: Weak entity uses composite primary key including strong entity's PK
